vibe: Technical, Objective, Brutalist, High-Contrast Control Room

headings.rules: Never center by default. Left-align for technical precision. Do not use Inter or Space Grotesk.

body.rules: Use for standard UI text, descriptions, and long-form reading.

mono.usage: CRITICAL: Use for all code snippets, metric numbers, UI labels, timestamps, and GitHub Repo names.

layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat, 1px solid border (#27272A), zero shadow, max border-radius 0px to 4px (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
layout_and_spacing.header: Solid background (#0A0A0A) with hard bottom border (border-zinc-800). No glassmorphism. It must feel like a rigid terminal window.
layout_and_spacing.density: High density. Use 2-3x more spacing for macro sections, but tight spacing (gap-2, gap-4) within technical widgets.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized to remove the 'default Vercel' look. Remove shadows entirely. Use square corners (rounded-none).
components.buttons: Flat solid colors. Primary CTA: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white.
components.inputs: bg-[#141414] border-zinc-800 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-400 rounded-none.
components.code_diff: Custom UI required. Font: JetBrains Mono. Removed line: bg-red-900/30 text-red-400. Added line: bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-400.
components.agent_loop_stepper: Vertical layout. Active step glowing with drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(74,222,128,0.5)]. Completed steps: subdued emerald. Pending steps: dark gray.
components.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages).

motion.hover: Instant color swaps, no bouncy animations. transition-colors duration-200.
motion.agent_status: Use subtle animate-pulse for active 'Thinking/Analyzing' states.

icons.style: Technical, clean, 1.5px stroke width. DO NOT over-decorate.

image_urls.description: Black flat screen computer monitor in dark room
image_urls.instructions: Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) if an auth/login page is created. Otherwise, avoid heavy imagery and rely on code aesthetics.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: This is a developer tool. The design must be extremely clean, high-contrast, and functional.
2. THEME: Use pure dark mode. Body background must be #0A0A0A. Do not use gradients or soft shadows.
3. FONTS: Import and apply Chivo (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body), and JetBrains Mono (Code/Metrics) from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. BORDERS: Rely on 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800) to separate sections, avoiding floating cards where possible. Use the 'Grid Borders' pattern.
5. CODE DIFFS: Implement a custom UI for code diffs using JetBrains Mono, with classic red/green syntax line highlighting. Do not use generic text for code.
6. AGENT LOOP: The Live Agent Loop (Observe -> Decide -> Act -> Verify) should be a prominent, glowing vertical stepper. It is the core value prop.
7. COMPONENTS: Install Shadcn, but override `radius` to `0` in theme config to ensure a rigid, brutalist tech look.
8. TESTING: Apply `data-testid` to all forms, buttons, links, and status text.
9. COLORS: Use Tailwind's zinc scale for neutrals. Primary action color is white (#FFFFFF). Success/Fix color is emerald-400 (#4ADE80).
